title: Earnings Call Transcript: Opendoor Q1 2026 Misses Forecasts, Stock Edges Up
text: Earnings Call Transcript: Opendoor Q1 2026 Misses Forecasts, Stock Edges Up. Despite missing on EPS forecasts, Opendoor's stock edged higher in trading following Q1 2026 earnings. The company reported revenue of $720 million, beating estimates of $665.2 million, but reported GAAP loss per share of -$0.18, missing consensus expectations of -$0.10. The earnings miss on the bottom line was offset by optimism about forward guidance and the company's profitability trajectory. Management's commentary on achieving adjusted EBITDA profitability on a 12-month go-forward basis resonated positively with investors, suggesting a shift in how the market is evaluating the company's progress toward its profitability goals.
